narrative:
Georgetown East (precinct in Brown County) has 1,046 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.8 percentage points.
